title: Auto copy with unique name

posts.author: GuyD (Guy Dresher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I’m looking for a way to automatically copy or create a new item on a secondary board, every new month.
The goal is to keep a monthly track of payments that was on previous months from a board that just list providers and current cost of each.

Any idea how and if this is possible?

Thank you!
